basic_details.job_title: ESIC Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 19 Specialist, Senior Resident and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Employees State Insurance Corporation (ESIC) has released an official notification for Walk-in Interview for 19 Super Specialist / Specialist / Senior Resident Posts. Eligible candidates can attend the Walk-in Interview on at the ESIC office with original documents and self-attested copies.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 69 years for all posts. For Senior Resident: Relaxation for SC, ST & OBC as per rules.

qualification.education_qualification: MCh/DM/DNB or PG Degree/DNB/Diploma in concerned speciality
qualification.details: Super Specialist (Full Time/Part Time): Recognized medical qualification as per Indian Medical Council Act, 1956, MCh/DM/DNB or equivalent in concerned Super specialty after recognized medical qualification; 5 years post super specialty experience for Senior Consultant level. Specialist (Full Time/Part Time): Recognized medical qualification as per Indian Medical Council Act, 1956, Post Graduate Degree/DNB or Diploma in concerned speciality after MBBS with TCMC registration; 3-7 years experience as per Junior/Senior level. Senior Resident (1 Year): Recognized medical qualification as per Indian Medical Council Act, 1956, Post Graduate Degree/DNB or Diploma in concerned speciality after MBBS with TCMC/Medical Council registration; DM/DNB preferred for superspeciality departments.

salary_details.details: Super Specialist (Full Time): Entry level Rs. 2,00,000/- or Senior level Rs. 2,40,000/- per month. Super Specialist (Part Time): Entry level Rs. 1,00,000/- or Consultant Rs. 1,50,000/- per month. Specialist (Full Time): Rs. 1,38,108/- (Level 11 Junior) or Rs. 1,60,752/- (Level 12 Senior) per month. Specialist (Part Time): Rs. 60,000/- per month. Senior Resident (1 Year): Approximately Rs. 1,38,108/- (Level 11 as per VIIth CPC).

selection_process: Interview Document Verification Merit List based on qualification

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for ESIC recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for ESIC recruitment is scheduled to be held on 25th May 2026. Candidates are advised to report at the specified time.

faq.question: Q2. What are the different posts available in this ESIC recruitment?
faq.answer: ESIC is recruiting for the posts of Super Specialist (Full Time/Part Time), Specialist (Full Time/Part Time), and Senior Resident (1 Year).

faq.question: Q3. What is the total number of vacancies released by ESIC?
faq.answer: A total of 19 vacancies are available for the Super Specialist, Specialist, and Senior Resident posts in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for applying to these ESIC posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the posts is 69 years. Age relaxation is applicable for Senior Residents as per government rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for ESIC recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee varies by category. General/OBC candidates need to pay Rs. 250/-, SC/ST candidates need to pay Rs. 50/-, while PwBD and Women candidates are exempted from the fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the minimum qualification required for the Senior Resident post?
faq.answer: For the Senior Resident post, a Post Graduate Degree/DNB or Diploma in the concerned specialty after MBBS with TCMC/Medical Council registration is required. DM/DNB is preferred for superspeciality departments.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the Specialist (Full Time) post?
faq.answer: The salary for a Specialist (Full Time) is Rs. 1,38,108/- (Level 11 Junior) or Rs. 1,60,752/- (Level 12 Senior) per month.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates (if applicable).

faq.question: Q9. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at the ESIC office in Kollam, Kerala. Specific venue details will be in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is provided for Senior Resident posts for SC, ST, and OBC categories as per the government rules and regulations.
